name: Safety Godown Company, Limited
summary: Safety Godown Company, Limited, an investment holding company, engages in leasing of investment properties in Hong Kong. It operates through Godown Operations, Property Investment, and Treasury Investment segments. The company is also involved in the operation of godowns; and securities trading and investment activities. Safety Godown Company, Limited was founded in 1960 and is based in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong.
